compiled_state.title: .claude/artifacts/ directory should be exempt from review and test gates
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: The .claude/artifacts/ directory contains brainstorm and research artifacts (JSON, markdown) that are not code and should not require code review or test gate passage. Add '.claude/artifacts/**' to review-gate-allowlist.conf so these files can be committed without triggering the review gate.
